name: SaaSHub
post_rules: Submit your SaaS via the 'Add a product' form. Free listing with a dofollow link. Main value is SEO (ranks for 'X alternatives' queries), not launch-day traffic. Fill out features and comparisons thoroughly.
description: SaaS directory focused on 'alternatives to X' discovery (~220k products listed). Dofollow backlink + SEO long tail is the prize.
